data.title: Lai Si Enterprise Holding Limited Forecasts Significant Profit Turnaround for 2024
data.description:
Lai Si Enterprise Holding Ltd. ( (HK:2266) ) has provided an update.

Lai Si Enterprise Holding Limited has announced a positive profit alert, expecting to record a profit after tax between MOP 21.0 million and MOP 26.0 million for the year ended December 31, 2024, compared to a loss of MOP 18.7 million in 2023. This improvement is attributed to increased revenue and gross profit from projects in Macau’s shopping malls and luxury retail sectors. However, the financial results are preliminary and unaudited, with the final results to be published on March 27, 2025.

More about Lai Si Enterprise Holding Ltd.

Lai Si Enterprise Holding Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the construction and engineering industry. The company focuses on projects related to large shopping malls and luxury brand retail chains, particularly in Macau.

YTD Price Performance: 12.50%

Average Trading Volume: 129,200

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$108M

data.title: UBS Reduces Stake in Revolution Beauty Group PLC
data.description:
Revolution Beauty Group plc ( (GB:REVB) ) has shared an update.

Revolution Beauty Group PLC, a company involved in the beauty industry, has experienced a significant change in its shareholder structure. UBS Group AG’s trading book holdings in Revolution Beauty Group PLC have fallen below the 5% threshold, resulting in a reduction of their voting rights to 0%. This change exempts them from further reporting obligations, potentially impacting the company’s market dynamics and stakeholder interests.

More about Revolution Beauty Group plc

data.title: Spheria Emerging Companies Limited Announces Estimated NTA
data.description:
The latest update is out from Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ).

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited, listed on the ASX under the ticker SEC, announced its estimated pre-tax Net Tangible Asset (NTA) backing per share as of March 11, 2025, at $2.406. This figure, which is unaudited and approximate, reflects the daily value of the company’s investment portfolio and cash balances, adjusted for management and performance fees, as well as estimated movements in operating costs and income taxes. The announcement provides stakeholders with an insight into the company’s financial standing, although it excludes provisions for tax on unrealized gains or losses.

More about Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 46,087

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

data.title: Mitsui & Co. Finalizes Acquisition of Rhodes Ridge Iron Ore Stake
data.description:
Mitsui & Co ( (JP:8031) ) has issued an update.

Mitsui & Co., Ltd. has signed a definitive agreement to acquire a 15% interest in the Rhodes Ridge iron ore project in Australia from AMB Holdings Pty Ltd. The acquisition, valued at approximately 2,003 million USD, is expected to have a minor impact on Mitsui’s financial results for FY March 2025 and is anticipated to be completed by FY March 2026, pending necessary approvals.

More about Mitsui & Co

Mitsui & Co., Ltd. is a Tokyo-based company engaged in a wide range of industries, including iron ore projects. It focuses on acquiring interests in significant projects to enhance its market position.

data.title: Vesync Co., Ltd Announces Delay in Privatization Scheme Document Dispatch
data.description:
The latest update is out from Vesync Co., Ltd. ( (HK:2148) ).

Vesync Co., Ltd, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, is undergoing a proposed privatization by Victory III Co., Ltd through a scheme of arrangement under section 86 of the Companies Act. The company has announced a delay in dispatching the Scheme Document, now expected around March 31, 2025. The proposal’s implementation is contingent on certain conditions being met, and stakeholders are advised to exercise caution.

More about Vesync Co., Ltd.

data.title: Farm Pride Foods Sees Increase in Substantial Shareholding
data.description:
Farm Pride Foods Limited ( (AU:FRM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Farm Pride Foods Limited has seen a change in the substantial holding of its shares, with LDL Custodians Pty Ltd ATF The 17 Holroyd Trust increasing its voting power from 9.74% to 10.97%. This change was primarily due to the conversion of vested options and performance rights into fully paid ordinary shares, as well as the dilution of holdings following the issuance of additional shares by the company. This adjustment in shareholding reflects strategic financial maneuvers that may influence the company’s market positioning and shareholder dynamics.

More about Farm Pride Foods Limited

data.title: Internetworking & Broadband Consulting Co., Ltd. Reports Q1 FY2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Internetworking & Broadband Consulting Co., Ltd. ( (JP:3920) ) just unveiled an update.

Internetworking & Broadband Consulting Co., Ltd. reported its financial results for the first quarter of the fiscal year ending September 2025, showing sales of 419 million yen and a profit of 10 million yen. The company transitioned to non-consolidated financial statements due to the business transfer of a subsidiary, impacting its reporting structure. The dividend forecast for the fiscal year is set at 12 yen per share, reflecting an increase from the previous year.

More about Internetworking & Broadband Consulting Co., Ltd.

Internetworking & Broadband Consulting Co., Ltd. operates in the telecommunications industry, providing consulting services focused on internet and broadband solutions. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the code 3920.
